title: bastardia viscosa var. sanctae-crucis
intro: Bastardia viscosa var. sanctae-crucis, also known as the "holy cross bastardia," is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bastardia viscosa var. sanctae-crucis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
